  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11/xkeyboard-config Makefile pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Install a symlink from PREFIX/share/xkb/compiled to /var/lib/compiled.
    Fixes a lot of runtime problems for a lot of people
